name: Tomato Tuna Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over high heat, bring 2/3 cup water to boiling.
2. Stir in rice and continue boiling until the rice is tender and all liquid is absorbed.
3. Meanwhile, in a 4-quart saucepan over medium heat, heat salad oil.
4. Cook celery and onion together until they are tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Add rice, tomatoes with their juice, tuna, peas, salt, sugar, Worcestershire Sauce, and 3/4 cup water to the pan.
6. Over high heat, bring the mixture to boiling again.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes to cook peas and blend flavors.
Note: This recipe provides nutritional information indicating that there are approximately 380 calories per serving.
